# Visual suffering

# Overview

I want my writing style to be [Iconic](../../Features/Iconic%2010158e628ba280648510f4544487aab5.md), like a graphic novel.

# Naruto

One of the most iconic examples of physical suffering in combat is at the end of the Naruto Season 2 Intro.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RiQrbSuLrsU

<aside>
💡

While in some respects James and Naruto are opposites, they both share the same scrappy, tenacious underdog quality.

</aside>

# Sense and Sensibility - The importance of visual suffering

[Sense and Sensibility - The importance of visual suffering](Visual%20suffering/Sense%20and%20Sensibility%20-%20The%20importance%20of%20visual%20s%2022858e628ba2804fbda3e9cc4dbacf47.md)

<aside>
💡

I’m not saying Elinor should have gotten into a fight and been beaten senseless, but *some* form of visualizing her pain would have been helpful.

</aside>
